title: 五毛對美國疫情 煽動輿論文件流出

replies.msg:
內容包括：如果美國沒有爆發疫情，應該如何應對，文件的煽動方向為：「應著力宣傳病毒是美國對華人開展生物戰，但只能讓紅色自媒體去實施」。

如果美國爆發大規模疫情，則煽動「美國政治體制不利於疫情防控，大力肯定中國的制度優越性」。
:中共加害吹哨者，更不利於疫情防控。

如果「美國死亡數較少」，就「強調死亡率」，如果死亡率也降低，就去「指出美國政府隱瞞數據，把新冠肺炎死亡統計為流感死亡數」。
:美國資訊透明，中國死人見唔見屍。

如果「美國開發出特效藥」，就「指出美國社會醫療成本昂貴，順便提醒讀者中國醫療費用低廉的優越性」。
:中國藥石亂投，抽人血做抗體,跳過臨床實驗直接使用疫苗,用中藥，無所不用其極，但至今仍未找到有效治療方法。

如果「美國民眾譴責政府」，就強調「美國政治體制無法反映民意」，反之，如果美國民眾沒有譴責政府，就指出「美國政府隱瞞數據導致民眾被欺騙」。
:美國網上輿論已被大陸軍操控，大陸興論機器已入侵，加已提醒。

如果「兩黨在疫情上對立加劇」，就指「美國政治體制是狗咬狗」，反之如果兩黨合作抗疫，就指「兩黨制的虛偽性和欺騙性」。
:美國政府已兩會已批出一系列防疲措施，指控不存在。

如果「美國確診數不多，死亡數不多，死亡率不高」，就強調「中國做出巨大犧牲，保護了世界」。
整個答案可謂「翻手為雲覆手為雨」。
:因為中共先隱瞞二個月疫情，導致大爆發，真係多撚謝。


懇請各位唔好比五毛SPIN開去
要英文先有用

replies.msg:
Guidelines for Propaganda Regarding to United States amid the Epidemic of COVID-19

Q: If US does not have epidemic of COVID-19, how will we respond?
A: Focus on propagandizing that the coronavirus is a bioweapon launched by US which targets on Chinese race, but remember, it can only be implemented by our media (pro-China media).

Q: If US has massive outbreak of COVID-19, how to respond?
A: Then we have to emphasize political system of US is unfavorable to contain the epidemic, meanwhile assert the superiority of China’s political system.

Q: If US has mild epidemic, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US citizen does not have enough economic capacity for testing resulting to low confirmed cases.

Q: If the number of deaths is respectively low in US, how to respond?
A: Then we should emphasize its mortality rate (death rate).

Q: If the mortality rate also decreased, how to respond?
A: We can point out that the US government is hiding the statistics, counting the number of deaths of the coronavirus into the number of deaths of flu.

Q: If US eventually develop a vaccine, how to respond?
A: We can point out that medical cost is expensive in US society, meanwhile, to remind the readers on the superiority of Chinese cheap medical cost.

Q: If US citizens condemn US government, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US political system can no longer to represent people’s voice.

Q: If US citizens did not condemn US government, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US government hid the statistics causing US citizens being lied.

Q: If US two parties’ opposition increases, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US political system is dog-eat-dog which is unable to deal with big matter.

Q: If US two parties collaborate to fight for the epidemic, how to respond?
A: We can point out the US two-party system’s hypocriticalness and deceptiveness.

Q: If US final confirmed cases, number of deaths and mortality rate are low, how to respond?
A: Focus on propagandizing China did a great sacrifice, protected the world.

有錯請屌

quote.msg:
內容包括：如果美國沒有爆發疫情，應該如何應對，文件的煽動方向為：「應著力宣傳病毒是美國對華人開展生物戰，但只能讓紅色自媒體去實施」。

如果美國爆發大規模疫情，則煽動「美國政治體制不利於疫情防控，大力肯定中國的制度優越性」。
:中共加害吹哨者，更不利於疫情防控。

如果「美國死亡數較少」，就「強調死亡率」，如果死亡率也降低，就去「指出美國政府隱瞞數據，把新冠肺炎死亡統計為流感死亡數」。
:美國資訊透明，中國死人見唔見屍。

如果「美國開發出特效藥」，就「指出美國社會醫療成本昂貴，順便提醒讀者中國醫療費用低廉的優越性」。
:中國藥石亂投，抽人血做抗體,跳過臨床實驗直接使用疫苗,用中藥，無所不用其極，但至今仍未找到有效治療方法。

如果「美國民眾譴責政府」，就強調「美國政治體制無法反映民意」，反之，如果美國民眾沒有譴責政府，就指出「美國政府隱瞞數據導致民眾被欺騙」。
:美國網上輿論已被大陸軍操控，大陸興論機器已入侵，加已提醒。

如果「兩黨在疫情上對立加劇」，就指「美國政治體制是狗咬狗」，反之如果兩黨合作抗疫，就指「兩黨制的虛偽性和欺騙性」。
:美國政府已兩會已批出一系列防疲措施，指控不存在。

如果「美國確診數不多，死亡數不多，死亡率不高」，就強調「中國做出巨大犧牲，保護了世界」。
整個答案可謂「翻手為雲覆手為雨」。
:因為中共先隱瞞二個月疫情，導致大爆發，真係多撚謝。

Guidelines for Propaganda Regarding to United States amid the Epidemic of COVID-19

Q: If US does not have epidemic of COVID-19, how will we respond?
A: Focus on propagandizing that the coronavirus is a bioweapon launched by US which targets on Chinese race, but remember, it can only be implemented by our media (pro-China media).

Q: If US has massive outbreak of COVID-19, how to respond?
A: Then we have to emphasize political system of US is unfavorable to contain the epidemic, meanwhile assert the superiority of China’s political system.

Q: If US has mild epidemic, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US citizen does not have enough economic capacity for testing resulting to low confirmed cases.

Q: If the number of deaths is respectively low in US, how to respond?
A: Then we should emphasize its mortality rate (death rate).

Q: If the mortality rate also decreased, how to respond?
A: We can point out that the US government is hiding the statistics, counting the number of deaths of the coronavirus into the number of deaths of flu.

Q: If US eventually develop a vaccine, how to respond?
A: We can point out that medical cost is expensive in US society, meanwhile, to remind the readers on the superiority of Chinese cheap medical cost.

Q: If US citizens condemn US government, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US political system can no longer to represent people’s voice.

Q: If US citizens did not condemn US government, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US government hid the statistics causing US citizens being lied.

Q: If US two parties’ opposition increases, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US political system is dog-eat-dog which is unable to deal with big matter.

Q: If US two parties collaborate to fight for the epidemic, how to respond?
A: We can point out the US two-party system’s hypocriticalness and deceptiveness.

Q: If US final confirmed cases, number of deaths and mortality rate are low, how to respond?
A: Focus on propagandizing China did a great sacrifice, protected the world.

有錯請屌

Q: If US final confirmed cases, number of deaths and mortality rate are low, how to respond?

香港離中共最近，但又防疫意識咁高，搞到太少人中招，令外國以為個病無傳聞咁勁。

香港人高估外國人防疫能力同智慧，無警告外國同要求外國封關，原來外國人只會要求有病既戴口罩，同埋相信世衛。

細菌戰一打上黎，中共先橫掃口罩，控制世衛，播毒全球，再以天神下凡咁拯救全球。。。
以8億人入面既幾百萬人，換取國際埋堆埋邊，反過來攻擊美國同反盤。

由此可見，香港人反送中咁奈，外國人根本唔會真係理，中共一用貪污手段，經濟利誘，外國人就跪着奶。
完全會忘記個疫情邊到黎，香港人遇過咩警暴，反正「依家中共幫咗我」。



如果今次唔將矛頭全數指向中共。。。
1.中共唔需要賠償隱瞞疫情，導致全球經濟下滑既損失，反過來要求外國向美國施壓。
2.中共向國際伸出援手，國際唔會再對香港關注，根據香港抗爭情況，香港人唔會真革命，最後變成中共霸權既跳板。
3.全球經濟下滑，配貪污手段，經濟援助下，外國倚靠中共，西方民主瓦解，變晒奶共總統，外國人因為親中反中，多咗政治鬥爭，或者獨裁軍政府。。。


希望國際文宣多做，要講多啲。。。
世衛奶共，香港台灣唔信中共先防到疫，扮小粉紅鬧鳩外國人，話係中国肺炎。。。。。

依家已經有啲國家已經中晒斯德摩，歷史係比勝利者寫。
警察同藍絲之所以奶共，係因為中共強者，而我地係弱者，連螞蟻都唔敢踩死，談咩理想？
今次病毒戰，如果比中共過關，後果不堪設想，唔好同我講五大訴求，諗定點偷渡過外國好過。

quote.msg: 一陣得閒我譯一下
求出手翻譯，唔該手足

Guidelines for Propaganda Regarding to United States amid the Epidemic of COVID-19

Q: If US does not have epidemic of COVID-19, how will we respond?
A: Focus on propagandizing that the coronavirus is a bioweapon launched by US which targets on Chinese race, but remember, it can only be implemented by our media (pro-China media).

Q: If US has massive outbreak of COVID-19, how to respond?
A: Then we have to emphasize political system of US is unfavorable to contain the epidemic, meanwhile assert the superiority of China’s political system.

Q: If US has mild epidemic, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US citizen does not have enough economic capacity for testing resulting to low confirmed cases.

Q: If the number of deaths is respectively low in US, how to respond?
A: Then we should emphasize its mortality rate (death rate).

Q: If the mortality rate also decreased, how to respond?
A: We can point out that the US government is hiding the statistics, counting the number of deaths of the coronavirus into the number of deaths of flu.

Q: If US eventually develop a vaccine, how to respond?
A: We can point out that medical cost is expensive in US society, meanwhile, to remind the readers on the superiority of Chinese cheap medical cost.

Q: If US citizens condemn US government, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US political system can no longer to represent people’s voice.

Q: If US citizens did not condemn US government, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US government hid the statistics causing US citizens being lied.

Q: If US two parties’ opposition increases, how to respond?
A: We can point out that US political system is dog-eat-dog which is unable to deal with big matter.

Q: If US two parties collaborate to fight for the epidemic, how to respond?
A: We can point out the US two-party system’s hypocriticalness and deceptiveness.

Q: If US final confirmed cases, number of deaths and mortality rate are low, how to respond?
A: Focus on propagandizing China did a great sacrifice, protected the world.

有錯請屌
